## Emerald 1.5.2

### Interface
- The left sidebar now shows the opened vault name instead of the generic
  "Notes" label.
- Mascot actions in the gear menu are grouped under a dedicated "Mascot"
  submenu.
- The settings dialog is larger, clearer, and better aligned.

### Images
- Notes can now include Markdown images.
- Insert, paste, or drop images into a note to copy them into the vault's
  `_attachments` folder and insert a portable Markdown image link.
- Standalone image lines render as centered inline previews while keeping the
  underlying note plain Markdown.

### Performance
- Reduced resident memory used by the search index, editor save tracking,
  mascot image caching, and updater downloads.
- Added current-RSS memory metrics to the development performance benchmark
  suite.

### Downloads
| Platform | File | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Linux (x86-64) | `Emerald-x86_64.AppImage` | `chmod +x` and run |
| Linux (ARM64)  | `Emerald-aarch64.AppImage` | `chmod +x` and run |
| macOS (universal) | `Emerald-macOS.dmg` | drag to Applications; first launch **right-click -> Open -> Open** |
| Windows | `Emerald-win64.zip` | extract and run `emerald.exe` |
